## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] New behavior has offline tests (no model download / GPU required)
- [ ] Version bumped in `whispergram.py` (`__version__`) and `pyproject.toml`, plus a `CHANGELOG.md` entry, if user-facing
- [ ] No private chat data, transcripts, or real names in the diff (`git status` checked)
